commax.blurb: Icomply installs and services Commax video door entry across flats, HMOs and commercial entrances throughout the North West. From new multi-tenant panels to handset swaps and entrance upgrades, our engineers commission systems correctly and leave landlords with clear certification. Trade spares and entrance kits are available from our Stockport shop for contractors working across Manchester and Cheshire.

commend.blurb: Commend intercoms are a strong fit for hospitals, campuses and high-security sites — Icomply designs, installs and maintains them across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. We handle master stations, door stations and network integration, with planned service visits and reactive call-outs when stations fail. Trade accessories and engineer spares ship from our Stockport trade counter for FM teams and installers.

contactum.blurb: Icomply supplies and installs Contactum consumer units and circuit protection for landlords, refurbs and commercial fit-outs across the North West. Our electricians work to BS 7671 with full certification, EICRs and board upgrades completed to a tidy trade standard. Stock Contactum breakers, RCDs and board spares from our Stockport shop for same-day engineer call-outs around Manchester.

cooper-fire.blurb: Cooper Fire detection systems need disciplined install and BS 5839 servicing — Icomply covers both for commercial and residential sites across the North West. We commission panels, devices and interfaces, then run planned maintenance with full certification for landlords and duty holders. Panel service kits, detectors and call points are held as trade stock from our Stockport base for Manchester and Cheshire engineers.

cooper-lighting.blurb: Icomply installs and tests Cooper Lighting emergency luminaires to BS 5266 for offices, retail and multi-occupancy housing across the North West. From new LED conversions to monthly function tests and annual three-hour discharges, we keep escape routes compliant with clear certification. Trade fittings, batteries and exit signage are available from our Stockport trade shop for contractors covering Greater Manchester.

courtney-thorne.blurb: Courtney Thorne nurse call is widely specified in care homes and assisted-living schemes — Icomply installs, expands and services systems to HTM 08-03 guidance across the North West. We replace call points, pear leads and panel batteries, and certify works for CQC-ready estates teams. Trade call-point kits and panel spares stock at our Stockport shop for rapid turnaround around Manchester and Lancashire.

crow-electronics.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Crow Electronics intruder alarms for shops, offices and residential portfolios across the North West. PIRs, contacts and panel kits are available trade from Stockport for Manchester and Cheshire security installers.

dh-mechatronic.blurb: D+H Mechatronic AOV and smoke-control actuators keep escape routes clear — Icomply installs, commissions and services them to BS 9991 / EN 12101 across the North West. Trade actuator service kits and panel consumables are available from our Stockport base for FM teams and fire engineers.
